general_notes: All values are from the Particle Data Group (PDG) 2024 Review of Particle Physics (https://pdg.lbl.gov/). Mass is the pole mass in MeV/c^2. Full width Gamma is the total decay width in MeV (related to lifetime by Gamma = hbar/tau). For narrow states, the width is very small (e.g. J/psi: ~0.093 MeV). These are the world-average values from the most recent PDG summary tables.

search_groups.description: PDG particle name with charge superscript.
PDG world-average pole mass and total decay width from the 2024 Review of Particle Physics.

validation_targets.description: PDG particle name with charge superscript.
validation_targets.notes: Use PDG naming convention (e.g. rho(770)0, phi(1020), J/psi(1S)).

validation_targets.description: PDG world-average pole mass in MeV/c^2.
validation_targets.notes: Source: PDG 2024 summary tables. Express to 2-3 decimal places.

validation_targets.description: PDG world-average total decay width Gamma in MeV.
validation_targets.notes: Source: PDG 2024 summary tables. For narrow resonances (J/psi, Upsilon) report at least 4 significant figures.
